<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelRay\Watchers; use Spatie\LaravelRay\DumpRecorder\DumpRecorder; use Spatie\Ray\Settings\Settings; class DumpWatcher extends Watcher { public function register(): void { $settings = app(Settings::class); $this->enabled = $settings->send_dumps_to_ray; app(DumpRecorder::class)->register(); } }
